name: Episode
description: A young vampire hunter who wields a giant cross as a weapon. He stole Kiss-Shot's left leg. Despite his physical appearance, he's only 6 years old. Episode often says, "Gotta love it," or, "That's hilarious," as a catchphrase. He has an aggressive and arrogant personality, and has a tendency to get carried away when fighting. ~!Episode is a half-vampire, he doesn't belong to humans or vampires; due to this, he is spiteful towards both sides.!~

name: Fumi Ohno
description: A 2nd-year high school student who is in a mountain of debt thanks to her father and will go to any lengths to pay it off. She is often worried because her employer is difficult to understand.

name: Hana Ayukawa
description: Hana Ayukawa is a high school student who both lives and works at [Machida](https://anilist.co/character/343190/Machida)'s convenience store. She has a strong passion for fishing, and was the one who saved [Sasaki](https://anilist.co/character/341776/Tsunehiro-Sasaki) from drowning.

name: Haruka Nanase
description: The Vice President of Student Council, who has long, green hair and green eyes. She seems to dislike Akatsuki a lot, especially after he steals both her bra and her panties during the middle of a school day, though she attacked him out of nowhere. Her weapons are two big blades. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Jirou Sakuma
description: One of the members of the original Teikoku team and a close friend of Kidou. After Kidou leaves Teikoku and joins Raimon's team, he and Genda become part of Shin Teikoku with Fudou as the new captain. Sakuma is still angry at Kidou for leaving Teikoku and is willing to use the dangerous forbidden Emperor Penguin shot to defeat Raimon's team, despite Kidou's protests. After a heated battle which ends in a tie, Sakuma collapses from overusing Emperor Penguin No. 1 and is taken to the hospital. How

name: Kaban
description: A young girl who finds herself in Japari Park with no memory of who she is or where she comes from. Named by Serval due to the backpack she carries (kaban meaning bag). Shy yet resourceful, she travels through Japari Park along with Serval to find out her identity while encountering more Friends along the way, eventually discovering that she is a human. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kanami
description: Kanami was the former leader of the now-disbanded Debauchery Tea Party before she moved to Europe and started a new account on the European servers.

name: Kei Kishimoto
description: __Height:__ 160 cm Kei Kishimoto appeared in the Gantz room naked due to her committing suicide in the bath. Originally Kurono is infatuated with Kishimoto. Yet Kishimoto doesn't feel the same way as she's very much in love with Katou, who reciprocates. Gantz gives her many nicknames such as "Big Tits" due to her incredibly large breasts.

name: Kenshirou Yozakura
description: __Height:__ 183cm The head supervisor of Nanba Prison's Building 4.

name: Kim Bu-Jang
description: Kim Bujang, also known as Code 66, is a retired military man and a father to Minji Kim.

name: Kirio Hikifune
description: Kirio Hikifune is a former captain of the 12th Division and a member of the Royal Guard. During her time as the captain of the 12th Division, her lieutenant, Hiyori Sarugaki, became very attached and came to love Kirio as much as she would her own mother. However, approximately 110 years ago, Kirio left the Gotei 13 to take up a position within the Royal Guard. She was soon succeeded by Kisuke Urahara, but failed to attend his inauguration ceremony.

name: Kokone Fuwa
description: **Height:** 165 cm (167 cm as Cure Spicy) Kokone is a fashionable, cool beauty. She's a 2nd year middle school student who loves make-up and cute things. Her family owns a fine restaurant, and she is an only child. She's called the flower of Takamine. She loves to be alone, and doesn't speak much. Kokone's favourite breads are curry bread and heart-shaped bread. With [Pam-Pam](https://anilist.co/character/260904/)'s power, she can transform into Cure Spicy.

name: Kotarou Enomoto
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3″) The younger brother of Natsuki Enomoto. Like his sister, Kotaro is a very emotive person. He's very quick to anger and annoy.

name: Kyuutarou Kaminaga
description: Kamisama is the nickname of a homeless old man who is bent on the return of ten-pin bowling as a major sport in Japan. Kamisama has the power of foresight and can see what will happen before it comes to pass.

name: Leonidas I
description: King of Sparta, despite the gruff and muscular appearance he's a cunning tactician though he doesn't betray his Spartan origin and fights like a brute. In time of great peril, when Greece was threatened by an invasion of the Persian Achaemenid Empire, he and 300 brave Spartan soldiers managed to hold back Xerxes I's 100.000 man army all by themselves in the Battle of Thermopylae. For three days they fought, and while none survived, their sacrifice gave time to the City-States of Sparta and Athen
